# HySounds — Hytale Sound Catalog
# https://hysounds.com/

## What is HySounds?
HySounds is a free reference tool that catalogs all 753 built-in Hytale sound IDs. It allows Hytale modders and server administrators to search, filter, and copy sound commands.

## Key Facts
- Total sounds: 753 unique sound IDs
- Categories: Creatures (357), Blocks (134), Weapons (116), UI/Environment (48), Magic (46), Crafting (31), Player (21)
- Action types: Death/Despawn, Hurt/Impact, Alerted/Idle, Spawn/Wake, Walk/Run, Attack/Swing, Loops/Ambient
- Copy formats: /sound 2d [ID], /sound 3d [ID] ~ ~ ~, JSON SoundEventId

## How to play sounds in Hytale
Use the built-in server commands:
- /sound 2d SFX_Wolf_Death — plays a 2D (global/UI) sound
- /sound 3d SFX_Wolf_Death ~ ~ ~ — plays a 3D (positional) sound at coordinates
- Add --all flag to play for all online players

## Sound ID Format
All Hytale sound IDs follow the pattern: SFX_[Entity]_[Action]
Examples:
- SFX_Wolf_Death — Wolf death sound
- SFX_Skeleton_Spawn_1 — Skeleton spawn sound variant 1
- SFX_Golem_Earth_Wake — Earth Golem waking up
- SFX_Portal_Neutral_Open — Neutral portal opening
- SFX_Divine_Respawn — Divine respawn effect
- SFX_Avatar_Powers_Enable — Avatar powers activation

## Creature Subcategories
- Passive Animals: Antelope, Bunny, Camel, Chicken, Cow, Deer, Duck, Fox, Frog, Horse, Pig, Rabbit, Sheep, etc.
- Hostile Mobs: Goblin, Hyena, Scorpion, Snake, Spider, Trork, Wolf, Crocodile, Emberwulf, etc.
- Undead: Skeleton, Skeleton Mage, Skeleton Praetorian, Zombie
- Void Creatures: Crawler Void, Eye Void, Spawn Void, Spark Living
- Bosses & Elites: Golem Earth, Golem Firesteel, Golem Frost, Golem Sand, Yeti, Klops
- Nature & Elemental: Spirit Root, Hedera, Feran, Larva, Scarak Fighter, Scarak Seeker

## Using sounds in Hytale mods
In NPC role JSON configs, use sound fields:
- "WorldSoundEventId": "SFX_Name" — all nearby players hear it
- "LocalSoundEventId": "SFX_Name" — only the triggering player hears it
- "HitSoundEventId", "DeathSoundEventId", "DespawnSoundEventId" — event-specific

## Sister Site
- HySpawns — Hytale Spawn Catalog: https://hyspawns.com/
